title: baphia massaiensis subsp. busseana
intro: Baphia massaiensis subsp. busseana is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is a climbing shrub native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Baphia massaiensis subsp. busseana is often made into a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
